response.overview: In the heart of Zacatecas, a love story ignites a bitter conflict between two families bound by pride and tradition. Andres, a hardworking and honorable man, finds true love with Elisa, but their relationship is rejected by her older brother Mariano, who refuses to accept him as part of the family.  As tensions rise, every encounter deepens the divide, turning words into conflict and pride into an unbreakable barrier. While Sandra, Mariano’s wife, dares to support the couple, others within both families become entangled in a growing feud fueled by loyalty and resentment.  Caught between love and honor, Andres and Elisa must navigate a world where family expectations threaten to destroy their future.  In a land where pride defines destiny, their love becomes both the cause of conflict and the only hope for peace.
response.title: De Un Rancho A Otro
